unit.detail: Affected plugin suites green: run 353, compliance 966, adopt 387, test 143, project 59, plan 57, deploy 26, changelog 23, design 19. New: shared test_get_phase_context 17, test_phase_invocation_mode_edges 19, run test_update_step_driven_run_guard 7.

integration.detail: integration-tests 230 passed (incl. new test_phase_invocation_mode_integration 4 + test_phase_skill_invocation_mode_canon 24); shared/tests 3948 passed (4 pre-existing ADR-044/045 cross-plugin-session failures, identical on untouched origin/main, green under each plugin's own session).

e2e.detail: F0.5 CLI surface: 33 tests via surface_verification.py --surface cli (resolver composed with the real phase_task_lifecycle frontier + the update-step guard driven as a CLI subprocess).

degraded.detail: classify_complexity raised touches_io_boundary from the DESCRIPTION prose; the diff-derived flags that actually bind are touches_io_boundary (shipwright_run_config.json producer/consumer) AND cross_component (get_phase_context.py). Both enforcements delivered: round-trip resolver edge tests + a category:integration behavior.

enumeration_basis.note: AC1-AC8 of .shipwright/planning/iterate/2026-07-14-phase-invocation-mode.md (AC8 added during build from the Stage-3 doubt review)

behaviors.behavior: AC1: no dispatch token -> standalone, carrying pipeline_active / active_phases / requires_out_of_sequence_warning derived only from v2 fields
AC1: three outcomes not two - a supplied-but-unusable token (empty / unsubstituted placeholder / corrupt config) is error, never a silent standalone downgrade
AC1: a v2-shaped but structurally corrupt config (phase_tasks:[null] / {} / 7) never raises - error on the token path, not-live on the tokenless path
AC2: validity contract - task must exist, match the caller's phase, and be in_progress (claimed); terminal / unclaimed / wrong-phase / unknown -> error with an actionable remedy
AC2/AC3: a valid actionable token for this phase -> pipeline (with splitId, prerequisites, artifacts)
AC1: active_phases dedupes concurrent same-phase tasks (the frontier shape a scalar current_step cannot represent)
AC1: TERMINAL_STATUSES copy pinned to the phase_task_lifecycle SSoT (self-contained per ADR-044, drift-guarded)

INTEGRATION (cross_component): every dispatched frontier phase of a real split-fanned run resolves pipeline through the actual phase_task_lifecycle transitions, while the old v1 predicate returns standalone at each - the bug and its fix, composed
INTEGRATION (AC8): update-step is inert in a driven run (no state write) yet keeps the v1 path for non-driven configs - a driven run cannot be wedged into needs_validation by a phase skill
behaviors.evidence: plugins/shipwright-run/tests/test_update_step_driven_run_guard.py (CLI subprocess; negative control reproduces the wedge with the guard removed) + integration-tests/test_shipwright_run_e2e.py (v1 path intact via _undrive)

behaviors.behavior: AC3: out-of-band invocation during a live driven run raises requires_out_of_sequence_warning; replayed / wrong-phase tokens are error not standalone
AC5: all 7 driven skills resolve the mode via get_phase_context.py and none name a v1 state field; the gate is binary + both-direction and catches the rename evasion (negative control)
behaviors.evidence: integration-tests/test_phase_skill_invocation_mode_canon.py (24 tests: registry<->files both ways, whole-file forbidden-string ban, required-resolver-pattern)

behaviors.behavior: AC4: the 5 *.out-of-sequence-continue gate summaries no longer describe the removed current_step predicate; catalog re-validates and the generated doc re-renders
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_gate_policy.py (26 passed) + resolve_gate_policy.py --render-doc regenerated docs/gate-catalog.md (CI drift-guard compares JSON->MD)

behaviors.behavior: AC7: docs/hooks-and-pipeline.md records the invocation-mode resolver contract + the update-step drivability guard (mandated when startup-context / between-phase behavior changes)
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_hooks_pipeline_doc*.py + the doc's own drift guards remain green in the shared suite (3948 passed)
